site.title: W/underlabs
site.label: Software lab
site.description: We build tools agents use to ship reliable systems.

home.title: Focused software products.
home.description: We design and build compact, resilient tools for people who care about clarity, speed, and craft.

intro.p1: W/underlabs, also written as Wunderlabs, is a software lab at https://wunderlabs.dev/.
intro.p2: We build tools agents use to ship reliable systems. We design and build compact, resilient software products for people who care about clarity, speed, and craft.

markdown.title: # W/underlabs
markdown.focusTitle: ## We are focus on reliable AI infrastructure
markdown.contactTitle: ## Open source by default. Ship with us.

focus.title: Focus
focus.description: W/underlabs focuses on reliable AI infrastructure for agent-driven development.

items.harnesses: Harnesses: Test agent behavior across real workflows, regressions, and long-running tasks with reproducible harnesses.
items.agenticDevEnvs: Agentic Dev Envs: Run and modify generated codebases in isolated, deterministic environments with zero local setup.
items.humanInTheLoop: Human-in-the-Loop: Inspect traces, review tool calls, replay failures, and keep humans involved where reliability matters.

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: W/underlabs builds open source tools for reliable agents.

description.p1: Claudebin publishes Claude Code sessions with a single command and produces a shareable link with syntax highlighting, tool calls, and the full conversation thread.
description.p2: Claudebin is useful for debugging, code review, and reproducible workflows.

openable.title: Openable
openable.description: Openable imports, runs, and edits full generated codebases without installing Node.js, configuring environments, or using the terminal.

description.p1: W/underlabs is connected to agentic.tm, a community for agentic builders.
description.p2: The community includes 200+ engineers, researchers, and academics working on agent-driven development.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: W/underlabs is based in Europe and is hiring agentic native engineers and researchers focused on infrastructure, reliability, and agent systems.
